title: Analytics aggregation endpoints
description: Backend endpoints computing key metrics from Trip/Bus/Complaint/User data.

subtasks.title: Route popularity metric
subtasks.description: Aggregate trip counts per route over a selected date range.

subtasks.title: Average delay metric
subtasks.description: Compute average delay (scheduled vs. actual trip times) per route/bus.

subtasks.title: Completed trips & bus utilization
subtasks.description: Count completed trips per bus, calculate utilization rate against scheduled trips.

subtasks.title: Driver performance summary
subtasks.description: Pull punctuality/delay stats per driver for dashboard display (data likely populated by Member 2's attendance feature — coordinate on schema).

subtasks.title: Peak travel hours
subtasks.description: Aggregate trip/passenger activity by hour-of-day to identify peak windows.
